name: web-app/react-vite
description: React + Vite + TypeScript single-page app (Tailwind, react-router). SaaS front-end surface (ADR-0011).
_note: Catalog is the fixed 7 (ADR-0005/0009). Front-end profile: MiniMax M3 (multimodal / frontend-from-design) is the PRIMARY implementer here — the role it was reserved for. P8 still enforced (minimax↔deepseek/kimi are cross-family). dispatch.sh reads roles + enforces P8; the Shrink web specs pin models explicitly.
